text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 156 

SR_GRP_ASGNMT_IND 

LABEL: Beneficiary Group Assignment Assistance Track 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) variable that indicates whether the beneficiary was assigned to the intervention 
group (the assistance track) or a control group. 

LONG NAME: SR_GRP_ASGNMT_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Control group 
1 = Intervention group
